title: HistRegGUI: Multiplatform Histological Image Registration with DeeperHistReg
description: HistRegGUI v2.0 is a desktop interface for histological and fluorescence image registration with DeeperHistReg. It supports independent one-target and ordered cascading registration, streamed 1x-32x registration downsampling, CPU and optional NVIDIA CUDA execution, and registration of multichannel IF against H&E through RGB registration guides while applying the resulting deformation to every original IF channel. It preserves channel names and dtype in CYX OME-TIFF outputs and can create memory-efficient RGB ZYXS and mixed H&E/IF scientific ZCYX BigTIFF OME-TIFF stacks for 3-D visualization in software such as Imaris. Packaged applications are provided for Windows, Linux, macOS Intel, and macOS Apple Silicon.
